closing.response_demand: I request that your office provide a written, reasoned response to this formal complaint within 15 days as required under IRDAI Grievance Redressal Guidelines.
closing.escalation_warning: Please be advised that if a satisfactory resolution is not provided within the prescribed regulatory timeframe, I may escalate this matter to the Insurance Ombudsman under the Insurance Ombudsman Rules 2017 and to the IRDAI Grievance Cell through the IGMS portal, without further notice.
closing.acknowledgement_request: I request acknowledgement of receipt of this complaint within 3 working days.

cgo_letter.subject_template: Formal Complaint Against Denial of {denial_type} Claim - Policy Number {policy_number} - CCN {ccn} - {denial_date}

closing.response_demand: I request that the Hon'ble Ombudsman take up this matter and direct the insurer to provide a fair and complete resolution.
closing.no_lawyer_note: I am representing myself in this matter and do not have legal representation.
closing.acknowledgement_request: I request acknowledgement of receipt of this complaint at the earliest.
